| **"The fate of the Senate majority lies in the hands of candidates scattered across the battleground map." --_Politico_** The stakes this year couldn't be higher. Friend, so much hangs in the balance -- and protecting everything we've fought for means taking back the Senate for Democrats.

The GOP knows what's on the line in November -- Mitch McConnell and high-dollar Republican donors are doing everything in their power to keep the Senate in their hands. We have to stand up to them.

The fate of the Senate will come down to a few swing states this November. We have to fight hard to elect progressives across the country who will fight for and protect Democratic values. Let's make sure we take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court.

[**Add your name to say you 're in to turn the Senate blue in 2016 >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2caa/738133e4/30d25632/7f82e5cc/808360480/VEsE/ "http://www.grassrootsforchange.com/flipthesenateja?utm_source=murphy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flipthesenate")

name: Aisling Kerins, JayInslee.com
subject: Explaining Bryant’s cash infusion [please read]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's important to understand the size of Bill Bryant's unbelievable cash infusion. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM0NTI3MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgwOTQ2MjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend, Republican Bill Bryant's nearly one-million-dollar TV blitz during the primary election was shocking. I was floored. Not because of the amount he spent, but because of how he got the money. Here's what we know: Just three weeks before the primary, Bryant had only $150,000 left to spend before the primary. And then seven ultra-wealthy individuals got together to fund over 60% of Bryant's last-ditch ad buy of nearly a million dollars. This is not my first campaign, but the last minute money that came to Bryant before the primary honestly shocked me. It makes me nervous about what he and his ultra-rich friends will do leading up to November 8th. We need to be prepared. [**If the last few weeks have shown us anything, it 's that we have to be ready to fight back against Bill Bryant's ultra-rich friends. Can Governor Inslee count on you for a $25 donation?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTM0NTI3MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgwOTQ2MjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) In the end, over 90% of Bill Bryant's TV ad spending came -- not from his campaign -- but from money funneled through the Washington State Republican Party. His access to massive sums of cash should put all of us on edge -- and make us more determined than ever to respond. Believe me, elections can turn on a dime, and Republican Bill Bryant's millionaire and billionaire friends are ready to provide him with a lot of dimes. Governor Inslee has been a champion for us -- for working Washingtonians -- his entire career. Now it's time for us to have his back. body:

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36962051:sRfAsjbdN:m:1:1155937413:218B957F9CD721864A1AEE5A9BA6F1E2:r)

Peter,

You've seen it - the liberal media can't stop telling outrageous lies about me.

**They are really a disgrace to journalism, and they 're so desperate to mislead the American people about our campaign!**

Yet at every stage we continue to prove them wrong, including:

* Smashing the Republican primary vote record by 1.4 MILLION votes;

* Pulling off an incredible Republican National Convention, with much higher viewership than the Democrats' disastrous convention;

* Packing stadiums everywhere we go;

* Raising $82 million in July alone from hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters.

Now we must continue to build on our great momentum all across the country.

[**That 's why we've launched a one-week "Power the Trump Train" campaign. We're working to raise $7 million in seven days, so we can continue to SMASH through the liberal media with the truth.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36962051:sRfAsjbdN:m:1:1155937413:218B957F9CD721864A1AEE5A9BA6F1E2:r)

We know the Clinton campaign will cheat to win - just like they did in the race for the Democratic nomination.

**And we know the liberal media will continue to say and do _ANYTHING_ to put Crooked Hillary Clinton in the White House!**

I know you've been following this race closely. I'm sure you're as sick and tired of their desperate lies as I am.

Day in and day out they attack me, our campaign, our Republican friends down the ticket and supporters _like you_ all across the country...

**...while giving Crooked Hillary a free pass on her terrible policies and long record of _failure and cronyism_!**

[**Don 't let them get away with it, Peter - help me prove our opponents and the liberal media wrong about the Trump movement, by growing our team and WINNING on Election Day!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36962051:sRfAsjbdN:m:1:1155937413:218B957F9CD721864A1AEE5A9BA6F1E2:r)

We're going to reach the American people _directly_ with our message about making better deals for our country, bringing back our jobs, and achieving a brighter future for every American.

**As you know, I always think big. That 's why we set an ambitious goal this week to raise $7 million by Monday at midnight.**

[**Please help us hit this critical goal with a $250, $100, $50, or even $35 contribution to "Power the Trump Train" - we now have just 88 days until Election Day, and I need every supporter on board.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36962051:sRfAsjbdN:m:1:1155937413:218B957F9CD721864A1AEE5A9BA6F1E2:r)

Thank you!

Best wishes,

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I have a message for the NRA, Peter
body:
Hillary isn't afraid of the NRA | Peter --

When I heard Donald Trump say that “Second Amendment people” can do something about it if they don’t like Hillary’s judicial appointments, I knew his allies in the gun lobby would stand by him. In reality, they did him one better:

The NRA went on Twitter to defend Trump’s remarks -- then they announced that they’re launching a new attack ad spreading lies and calling Hillary vicious names. They’re spending $3 million to show it to voters in pivotal states.

**[I have no intention of letting the gun lobby decide the outcome of this election -- if 19 people from your area chip in today, that will be a great start toward getting the funds Hillary needs to fight back. Can you help with $1? When you do, the campaign will send you a free sticker to say thanks](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYyMTcyNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMDMxMzgzS0&mt=1&rt=0).**

The gun lobby has deep pockets, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to keep their Republican allies in control of Congress. Donald Trump has made it clear he’ll do whatever they say -- so they’re going to spend millions and millions of dollars to try to help him win.

Hillary isn’t afraid of the NRA. She’s courageous, and if she’s president, she’ll take on the gun lobby in Washington, just like she has her entire career. That’s why I’m fighting for my friend Hillary -- I’m so glad you are, too.

**The NRA doesn’t decide the future of our country -- we do. Chip in right now, and let’s show the NRA that however hard they fight for Donald Trump, we’ll fight back even harder for Hillary:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMTcyNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMDMxMzgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Gabby

Watch our newest TV ad. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf442d/1c469400/7eda9a4/3572106/1082084789/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-12_1923_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-12_1923_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Russ's grandfather, Max, came to America in the early years of the twentieth century. He settled in Janesville -- a small town in Rock County -- to raise a family and own his own piece of the American dream. One of Max's proudest moments was buying a brand-new truck from the GM factory in Janesville in 1923. The GM plant was one of the biggest job creators in Janesville. When the plant closed down in 2008, thousands of Wisconsinites were put out of work. The story is all too familiar: Factories shut down. Workers lose their jobs. Often, those jobs are shipped overseas, leaving middle-class and working Americans high and dry. And lawmakers like Senator Ron Johnson make it even easier for corporations to cut corners by supporting a tax code that rewards companies for exporting American jobs. **[Russ knows we need an economy that works for everyone -- not just billionaires and CEOs. That's the focus of Russ's brand-new ad, "1923." name: Michelle Kleppe, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Can you help register voters?
body:
| Peter --

With just 88 days to go before Election Day -- and early and absentee voting starting in less than two months in a bunch of states -- the time has come for one of my favorite parts of campaigning: getting folks registered to vote! There’s nothing like seeing the look on someone’s face when they’re getting ready to cast their first-ever ballot -- and you have a chance to make that happen right in your own community.

**[Will you sign up for a shift to help register voters in your town? This team is committed to getting 3 million Americans registered and committed to vote by November 8th, but we need your help starting today.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyMjE1NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTM4Njc0S0&mt=2&rj=ODYyMTM4Njc0S0&rt=0)**

There are a couple of different ways you can do your part. You can make calls from one of our fun and energetic field offices or from the comfort of your own home. You can also pound the pavement -- clipboard and smile in tow -- and talk to people in a nearby neighborhood. There’s no better time to register voters than summertime, right?

Don’t wait to get involved. This election is going to be over before you know it. And we all have to step up and do whatever it takes to elect Hillary and defeat Donald Trump. **Sign up right now to register the voters we’re going to need to win:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=47&ms=MjYyMjE1NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTM4Njc0S0&mt=2&rj=ODYyMTM4Njc0S0&rt=0)
Thank you,

Michelle

We just launched our very own podcast -- _With her_ will tell the story of what it's really like to run for president. **[You won't want to miss this. Download the first episode, then subscribe right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyMjQ1NTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTYzMjI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

So, what’s _With her_ going to be about? It's a window into life on the campaign trail. You'll hear from Hillary Clinton, Tim Kaine, their supporters, and staff about the little details from 2016 that they'll never forget.

We think you’ll like our first host: a certain glass-ceiling shattering, pantsuit-wearing presidential candidate who’s striving to make life better for every single person who calls America home -- and whose latest feat involves miraculously finding time to chat with co-host Max Linsky during a packed campaign stop in Miami, Florida.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Three important races
body:
#
The political revolution was never just about electing a president. It's a movement of millions of Americans uniting to upend the status quo and transform our country. That's why we're coming together around dozens of strong candidates -- from school board to Senate -- to win important victories on November 8th.
We need to elect a wave of progressive candidates all over this country who will fight for the values we share, and that's why I'm asking you today to support three people who have long stood with our political revolution:
[Make a $2.70 contribution right now to help elect three strong progressives who support our movement: Zephyr Teachout, Rick Nolan and Pramila Jayapal.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812")
**[Contribute $2.70](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812")**
These candidates endorsed Bernie's campaign for president because they believe in our political revolution. They had the guts to take on the establishment when it wasn't necessarily going to be easy and we know they will be strong and consistent allies in the fight for economic, social, environmental and racial justice in the House of Representatives.
**Zephyr Teachout (New York):** Zephyr is running in a swing district, but she's running on a progressive agenda that will win working people on both sides of the aisle. Zephyr wrote a book on political corruption because she understands deeply how wealthy campaign contributors are buying our politicians and rigging our economy. In Congress, she'll fight to ban fracking and rein in Wall Street. This won't be an easy race and she needs your financial support.
**Rick Nolan (Minnesota):** Rick represents one of the most competitive congressional districts in the country, but he's been a strong fighter for enacting single-payer health care, overturning Citizens United and ending offshore tax havens. He's running against a multimillionaire CEO who thinks he can pour millions into television ads, win himself a congressional seat, and then cast votes to cut taxes on the ultra-rich.
**Pramila Jayapal (Washington):** Pramila was a leader in the fight for paid sick leave and a $15 minimum wage in Seattle. She's been taking on the ruling class in Washington state for years, and now we need to make sure she gets past a tough general election so that she can be one of our strongest allies in Congress.
[Let's win these races. Make a $2.70 contribution right now to elect these progressives who are going to fight for our revolution in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812")
I believe that when future historians look back and describe how our country moved forward and created a government which represents all people and not just the few, they will note that, to a significant degree, that effort began with the political revolution of 2016 and the tidal wave of strong leaders we elected all over the country.
Thank you for all you're doing to power our movement. Let's keep it going.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-house?refcode=em160812")**

Paid for by Our Revolution
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002 | (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests and help build the future of our political revolution by [adding a contribution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email_footer").

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: We need 16 donations from your town before midnight
body:
We have until midnight. | Peter --

One thing I’ve learned over the last few months is to take Donald Trump at his word. If he says he’s going to build a wall, we should understand that he'll try to do so if he wins this election.

And if he says he’s raising millions every single day, well, we can’t afford not to take that seriously -- after all, Trump and the Republicans raised more than $80 million in July alone.

So we’ve set a hard goal of raising $1,000,000 online before midnight tonight to keep us on track for the month of August. It’s a big reach, but we’ve run the numbers, and we can get there if 16 folks in your town step up to help.

**Will you make one of those donations right now? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMjUxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTY3OTU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Hillary for America

| Greetings,
---
|
Greetings and welcome to the General Election!

We cannot thank each of you enough for all of your support throughout the Primary campaign. With your help Phil won the Republican nomination to be Vermont's next Governor, and we are so deeply grateful for your help in earning that victory. Countless supporters volunteered their time and resources marching in parades, joining Phil at events, and spreading Phil’s message and priorities. Your support is the reason Phil was successful in the primary and on behalf of the whole team, THANK YOU.

This week, we are refocusing our efforts on the general election and we look forward to working with you for the next three months to elect Phil Scott the next Governor of Vermont. And now, some select highlights from a highlight-filled week!

**PHIL TAKES THE HIGH ROAD TO VICTORY**
As you may have heard, Phil Scott is now your Republican candidate for Governor – something we couldn’t have achieved without you. We faced a tough primary battle, one that has made us stronger for the General Election, and one that showed definitively that **Vermonters want positive campaigns and leaders**! We are so proud to have taken the High Road to victory. **Phil is more resolved than ever to lead this state and to focus all of our attention on _growing the economy_ and _addressing the fiscal issues that are making Vermont unaffordable_ for working families**.

If you missed Phil’s speech Tuesday night, we encourage you to view it [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ad433d011f&e=19cebfe173). If you are new to the campaign, or know someone who is, please check out [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2719cd6c0a&e=19cebfe173) to learn more about Phil’s priorities, leadership and plans to strengthen our economy and make Vermont more affordable. And don’t forget to follow us on our social media channels:
* Facebook: [Phil Scott for Vermont ](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a19e9732a1&e=19cebfe173)
* Twitter: [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fd469c8a0e&e=19cebfe173) and [@PhilScottVT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9833297844&e=19cebfe173)
* Instagram: [@PhilScottVT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bfab23c426&e=19cebfe173)

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT ***
**THE VERMONT GOP CELEBRATES VICTORY WITH UNITY BREAKFAST**
Regardless of our differences throughout the Primary, Vermonters who supported Phil, his opponent or any of the Republican candidates for state offices all have one common goal: to end the trend of overspending and overtaxing in Montpelier so that Vermont is more affordable for everyone. We must all come together to make certain that Phil Scott is Governor, that we end one party rule, and that we have leadership and legislators in the statehouse that will make the economy their number one priority.

To demonstrate our unity towards that common goal, the Vermont GOP hosted a Unity Breakfast this week, bringing together the top voices of our party. **For those that didn’t vote for Phil in the Primary, he will _work hard to earn your vote_ in November and _he will fight for each and every one of you_ as Governor**. Read more about the Unity Breakfast from VT Digger [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6a25cedcad&e=19cebfe173).

Photo credit: [Vermont Republican Party Facebook Page](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b973bed5d3&e=19cebfe173)
*******
**NO SLOWING TEAM SCOTT DOWN**
Overdrive is an understatement for Phil and Team Scott in the final week before the Primary vote. Our team and supporters were out in droves, holding signs and meeting Vermonters throughout the state. Can you believe we hit six towns in less than 12 hours? Thank you to **St. Albans** , **South Burlington** , **Rutland** , **Barre** and **Morrisville** for your hospitality in the final hours of our Primary campaign!
**Photo credit: @PhilScott4VT**
Team Scott also found time to visit **Franklin County Field Days** , **Lake Champlain Dragon Boat Festival** , **South Burlington’s vibrant farmer’s market** , and to meet with residents of **Cambridge**.

**Photo credit: @PhilScott4VT**
Stay tuned for our upcoming events during the General Election by checking in with our Events page [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=09310b87a6&e=19cebfe173). ***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Primary Victory Highlights_**

"When I am governor, we're going to **restore faith and trust in state government** by **focusing on the fundamentals of a strong economy** , never overpromising and always following through.” (Source: Vermont Public Radio: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=11a0709174&e=19cebfe173))

"**We cannot tax our way to a stronger, more affordable Vermont**.” (Source: Burlington Free Press: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4d38e0345c&e=19cebfe173))

“This is going to be a campaign about **the economy, making Vermont more affordable and restoring faith and trust** in the political process.” (Source: Vermont Press Bureau: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d6e4dc36d8&e=19cebfe173))

“[To increase efficiency, we need] a **culture change throughout state government** , **modernization of IT** , and I believe we need to look at areas like Medicaid.” (Source: WCAX: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4ce4c6f59c&e=19cebfe173))

**“** It takes discipline to **keep the** **high ground and to stay focused on our vision** for Vermont.” (Source: WCAX: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4f118b3db2&e=19cebfe173))

“**My biggest fear wasn’t me losing this election** , for me it was about the message a loss could send. And that would be that you would have to have a lot of money and you would have to go negative in order to win an election. And I think that would have had a ripple effect across the political spectrum here in Vermont for a number of years. That’s what I really feared. **It went beyond me**.” (Source: VT Digger: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c269b43fe4&e=19cebfe173)) ***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_Burlington Free Press: Vermont home prices stuck at 2009 level_**
UVM Associate Professor of Economics and Burlington Free Press contributor Art Woolf gives another in-depth look at the factors impacting Vermont’s economy and affordability. This week, he examined our housing market, concluding that **housing costs account for a significant portion of income, making our hosing market unaffordable**. As Phil has said before, we do a good job of providing affordable housing for lower income Vermonters, but less so for moderate income Vermonters who still find housing unaffordable. It’s one of the challenges to attracting and retaining a young workforce, which is why **Phil will explore incentives such as affordable housing to help attract talented workers to Vermont**. Read Prof. Woolf’s full analysis [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8e5f7a56aa&e=19cebfe173) and more about Phil’s pro-growth investment strategy [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=594ba8e059&e=19cebfe173). *******
Thanks to everyone that came out to events and VOTED this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e61f55868a&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f0e0a840df&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

* A Koch group AND the national Republicans are desperately trying to keep Evan out of office -- **they know he 'll be an independent voice, not a rubber stamp for the Koch brothers' reactionary agenda.**

* And now, a group connected to obstructionist Senate leader Mitch McConnell has pledged _$1 million_ for Congressman Young... on top of the $800,000 they spent on his primary!

**But we 're fighting back. **Evan has been tirelessly traveling the state to meet with Hoosier voters. And our campaign has a new ad on the air. But Friend, we can only do so much by ourselves. We need your support to run the robust campaign it'll take to win this race.

name: Joe Biden
subject: I’m not mincing words, Peter
body:
A Trump presidency would be a nightmare. | There’s no reason to mince words here, Peter: No major party nominee in the history of this nation has ever known less or been less prepared to deal with our national security than Donald Trump.

If we lose this election, our country will become less safe after Barack and I leave office in January. That’s the honest truth, and it’s frightening.

So when I tell you that Team Hillary needs to raise $1,000,000 today, **[I mean it](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyMjc2MjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg3Mzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**. We need to raise that much before midnight tonight to make sure the nightmare of a Trump presidency doesn’t become a reality.

I don’t want to see all of the hard work and progress we’ve made over the last eight years undone. But more than that, I don’t want a man elected president who rejects so much of what makes our country great -- a belief that ordinary Americans can do extraordinary things, and a belief that anyone can make it in America, no matter who they are, where they come from, or who they love.

So we need to hit our goal today, and every day until November 8th.

**You can help us get there, but you need to step up right now. Will you chip in right now to get your free Team Hillary sticker?**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYyMjc2MjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg3Mzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you -- it means a lot.

Joe
